# Zumex

> Zumex — do'konlar va savdo tarmoqlari uchun bulutli savdo, ombor va CRM boshqaruv tizimi (SaaS). Ombor va qoldiqlar, sotuv (POS), moliya, mijozlar va hisobotlarni bitta platformada birlashtiradi. O'zbekiston bozori uchun ishlab chiqilgan; uz (lotin/kirill), ru va en tillarida ishlaydi.

Zumex is a cloud Retail ERP + CRM SaaS for stores and retail chains. It unifies
inventory and stock control, sales (POS), finance, customer management and
analytics in one system, built for the Uzbekistan market. It fits any retail
vertical — from grocery and electronics to auto parts and building materials.

## Asosiy sahifalar (Key pages)

- [Bosh sahifa / Home](https://zumex.uz/): mahsulot tavsifi, imkoniyatlar, tariflar, demo so'rash
- [Uzbek (latin)](https://zumex.uz/uz): asosiy til
- [Русский](https://zumex.uz/ru): rus tilidagi versiya
- [English](https://zumex.uz/en): inglizcha versiya
- [Maxfiylik siyosati / Privacy](https://zumex.uz/privacy)
- [Foydalanish shartlari / Terms](https://zumex.uz/terms)
- [To'lovni qaytarish / Refunds](https://zumex.uz/refunds)

## Imkoniyatlar (Features)

- Ombor va zaxira nazorati (real vaqtda, shtrix-kod skaner bilan)
- Sotuv (POS), qaytarishlar va chegirmalar
- Ko'p do'kon: filiallar orasida transfer va yagona nazorat
- CRM: mijozlar bazasi va yetkazib beruvchilar
- Rollar va ruxsatlar (RBAC)
- Hisobot va tahlil, CEO dashboard
- Jonli bildirishnomalar
- Payme / Click / Uzcard / Humo / VISA / Mastercard to'lovlari

## Kontakt (Contact)

- Sayt: https://zumex.uz
- Ilova: https://zumex.uz (ro'yxatdan o'tish va login shu yerda)
- Email: sales@zumex.uz
